top_signals.title: Gold heads for worst quarter in more than a decade as retail frenzy fades
top_signals.summary: Expectations of higher interest rates fuelled by Iran war help end bullion’s record rally
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump, the Fed and footnote 8 in the Lisa Cook case
top_signals.summary: The US president lost round one, but can fire her again if he thinks he has cause
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump Pressures Gas Stations to Slash Prices "Immediately"
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump has scolded fuel retailers for failing to cut prices at the pump, saying in a social media post “Gasoline Retailers must get their Prices down, IMMEDIATELY! They’re too high considering that Oil is now at $68 a Barrel, and heading south.” “The Retailers must quickly react to this statement, and do what they know is right — DROP YOUR PRICE FOR OUR GREAT AMERICAN PEOPLE! There will be no gauging, which is totally illegal. If Retailers don’t do this, big problems lie ahead! Start targeting…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan nears longest postwar growth even as households struggle
top_signals.summary: The government kept its view that the economy is "recovering moderately," signaling the expansion still has room to run.
